description: Two elderly people sit in wooden chairs beside a blue cast-iron wood stove in a rustic room. The man, seen from behind, wears a lavender plaid shirt and blue trousers. The woman at right, in a green cardigan and blue top, faces him. A blue coal bucket sits on the floor to the left. Orange flames glow through the stove's window. The walls are warm ochre stone or plaster, and a shelf with small items is visible above. The floor has a red tile pattern. The painting is rendered in bold, flat strokes with strong blue and warm earth tones.
